# Shrutam (शृतम्)

> Shrutam is India's first audio-first AI personalized learning app for school students (Class 5-10). It features an AI teacher called SAAVI who teaches in 5 Indian languages (Hindi, Hinglish, English, Telugu, Marathi), is available 24/7, and includes India's first blind-accessible learning mode. Priced at ₹199/month vs ₹3,000+ for a private tutor. Covers CG Board (CGBSE) and CBSE syllabi with NCERT-aligned content. Built by Aarambha. Launching May 20, 2026 at shrutam.ai.

Shrutam means "that which is heard" in Sanskrit — from India's oral learning tradition (Shruti parampara). The platform is designed for Hindi-medium students in Tier 2/3/4 Indian cities and villages who cannot afford private tutoring.

## Key Features

- **SAAVI AI Teacher**: 24/7 AI teacher who speaks like an elder sister (didi). Uses Hinglish naturally, not translated English. Never says "wrong" — always encourages.
- **Ask Like 10**: One concept explained 10 different ways (analogy, story, experiment, diagram, quiz, real-life, comparison, mnemonic, common mistake, equation).
- **Zero to Hero**: Prerequisite-based learning — checks foundation, fills gaps, then advances to board-level content.
- **Audio-First**: Designed for students who learn better by listening. Every concept has audio explanation.
- **5 Languages**: Hindi, Hinglish, English, Telugu, Marathi — natively generated, not translated.
- **Blind Mode (FREE forever)**: India's first blind-accessible AI tutor. TalkBack/VoiceOver compatible, voice quiz, scribe dictation cues, verbal diagram descriptions. No "see the diagram" — ever.
- **Parent App (FREE)**: Daily progress report via WhatsApp, bedtime lock, subject-wise weakness alerts.
- **Mock Exams**: 4 difficulty levels — Easy, Medium, Hard, Board Ready. Includes Assertion & Reasoning type (CBSE standard).
- **Photo Doubt Solver**: Click photo of handwritten or printed question, get step-by-step solution.
- **Revision Mode**: After-school revision with SAAVI, community topper notes.

## Boards & Syllabus

- CG Board (CGBSE) — Class 5-10
- CBSE (NCERT) — Class 5-10
- Maharashtra SSC — Coming Soon
- MP Board (MPBSE) — Coming Soon
- AP/Telangana Board — Coming Soon

## Subjects

Science, Mathematics, Hindi, Social Science, English — all NCERT chapter-aligned.

## Pricing

- Free Trial: 7 days, 2 subjects, basic SAAVI access
- Shrutam Pro: ₹199/month — all subjects, all features, unlimited doubts
- Blind Mode: FREE forever
- BPL students: Subsidized rates

## Company

- **Product**: Shrutam (शृतम्) — shrutam.ai
- **Parent Company**: Aarambha (आरम्भ) — aarambhax.ai
- **Legal Entity**: Aarambha
- **Founded**: 2026
- **Location**: India (Chhattisgarh)
- **Contact**: hello@shrutam.ai
- **Accessibility**: accessibility@shrutam.ai
- **Schools**: schools@shrutam.ai
